topImprovementLevers: Expose and select Velo-specific options, market-cap, futures-row, and spot-row tools instead of returning zero-tool refusals or substitute data.
When prompts ask for volume, liquidation imbalance, depth, or execution cost, force calls to tools that actually expose those fields and repair failed post-processing.
Prevent spot/perp instrument alias mismatches and require source-aware argument construction before synthesis.
